LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITION TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED IN PART AND THE COURT DENIES THE SANCTIONS REQUEST. BASED ON THE STIPULATION OF PARTIES, THE COURT APPOINTED PHIL DIAMOND, ESQ. AS ARBITRATOR. THE COURT DENIED PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO SET A 6-MONTH DEADLINE FOR COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION. THE COURT INSTRUCTED COUNSEL TO CONTACT AND MEET WITH PHIL DIAMOND, ESQ. IMMEDIATELY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CHARLES LEE'S PETITION TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 6, 2015 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 6, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF USAA'S PARTIAL JOINDER. JUDGE : SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. (302/SRB)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARNCES: Atty. JUDITH GRAZIANO of The Hassell Law Group APC, Tel No. (415) 334-4111 appearing for Petitioner Charles Lee;
Atty. DAVID P. LANE of Law Offices of Gregory V. DeBernard, Tel No. (925) 977-1400 appearing telephonically for Respondent USAA Casualty Insurance Company.

RULING - The matter was argued by counsel. After meeting and conferring, counsel stipulated to the selection of Phil Diamond, Esq. as arbitrator. The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: PETITIONER CHARLES LEE'S Petition To Appoint Arbitrator is granted in part and the court denies the sanctions request. Based on the stipulation of parties, the Court appointed Phil Diamond, Esq. as arbitrator. The Court denied Petitioner's request to set a 6-month deadline for completion of arbitration. The Court instructed counsel to contact and meet with Phil Diamond, Esq. immediately. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Petition To Appoint Arbitrator
Off Calendar Mar-06-2015 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER CHARLES LEE'S Petition To Appoint Arbitrator is continued to April 6, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 6, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of USAA's partial joinder. Judge : Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg
